message:
test(toon): add unit tests for TOON format encoding (bd-2lmf)

Add comprehensive tests for TOON output format:
- TestTOONOutputFormat: verify --format=toon produces valid TOON output
- TestTOONRoundTrip: encode to TOON, decode back with tru, verify integrity
- TestTOONTokenStats: verify --stats produces token statistics on stderr
- TestTOONSchemaOutput: verify --robot-schema works with TOON format

All tests properly skip if tru binary is not available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
